title: SG Trades
description: Adds new trades to all villager professions
body:
The following trades where added to the villagers:
- ARMORER:
- Sells Iron horse armor (Apprentice)
- Sells Golden horse armor (Apprentice)
- Sells Diamond horse armor (Journeyman)
- BUTCHER:
- Buys Egg (Expert)
- Buys Blue eggs (Expert)
- Buys Brown eggs (Expert)
- CARTOGRAPHER:
- Sells Brush (Master)
- Sells Glow item frame (Master)
- CLERIC:
- Sells Amethyst shard (Expert)
- FARMER:
- Buys Glow berries (Novice)
- FISHERMAN:
- Sells Tropical fish bucket (Master)
- FLETCHER:
- Buys Arrows (Novice)
- Buys Spectral arrows (Journeyman)
- LEATHERWORKER:
- Sells Bundle (Master)
- LIBRARIAN:
- Sells Writable books (Master)
- Buys Glow Ink sac (Master)
- MASON:
- Buys Resin bricks (Novice)
- Sells Clay (Apprentice)
- SHEPHERD:
- Sells String (Master)
- TOOLSMITH:
- Buys Copper ingot (Novice)
- WEAPONSMITH:
- Sells TNT (Journeyman)
